# TokenMart

> Same GPT, Claude, Gemini and 40+ models — at up to 65% below retail.
> Real savings from GPU-level optimization, not routing tricks.

## About

TokenMart resells official frontier model APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google,
DeepSeek, xAI, ByteDance and others) at a discount enabled by GPU-level
inference optimization, not by re-routing to cheaper models or quantized
clones. The model you call is the model you get.

- [Terms of service](https://thetokenmart.ai/terms-and-services)

- [LLM Prompt Caching in 2026: The Setup, the Math, and Three Ways It Quietly Fails](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog/llm-prompt-caching): The headline 90% discount vs the actual 50–85% bill reduction. Provider-by-provider mechanics, high-hit-rate patterns, failure modes, and how caching stacks with routing and batch.
- [OpenAI-Compatible API in 2026: How to Call Claude, Gemini, and Grok Without Rewriting Code](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog/openai-compatible-api): Two-line migration to call any major model through the OpenAI SDK, edge cases that break in practice, and production patterns for failover and runtime model selection.
- [Claude API Alternatives in 2026 (and the One Case Where None of Them Fit)](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog/claude-api-alternatives): Tier-by-tier replacement matrix for Claude Opus / Sonnet / Haiku, plus the routing-not-replacing pattern that beats picking one model.
- [How to Access Sora 2 and Veo 3 via API in 2026 (Without the Tier-2 Wall)](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog/sora-2-veo-3-api-access): Sora 2 sits behind OpenAI Tier-2; Veo 3 behind Vertex AI / GCP. Aggregator access skips both.
- [TokenMart vs OpenRouter: Why the Same Claude Opus Costs 15% Less](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog/tokenmart-vs-openrouter): OpenRouter forwards provider list pricing plus a 5.5% credit fee. TokenMart prices the same models 15–65% below list.
- [How LLM Aggregators Sell Claude Opus 4.7 at $4.25/Mtok Instead of $5.00](https://thetokenmart.ai/blog/llm-aggregator-pricing): The actual mechanic behind the 15–65% discount — volume-tier pass-through, smart routing, prepaid credit bonuses.
